# Sniper Duels Auto Shop

> Sniper Duels Auto Shop is the official transactional store for the Roblox game Sniper Duels — selling gems, snipers, knives, and crates with automated in-game bot delivery in under two minutes. Companion content site sniperduels.net hosts the free value list, trading guides, and middleman service. Both sites are operated by the same team.

Gems use tiered bulk pricing: $2.90/k retail (1k–99k), dropping to $2.65/k at 100k+. Delivery is handled by an automated trade bot in a private Roblox server — buyers sign in with Roblox OAuth, check out with card (Pandabase) or crypto (NowPayments, 30+ assets), join the private server, and the bot trades automatically. Failed deliveries auto-credit USD to the buyer's platform wallet at 1:1.

## Docs

- [Buy gems](https://sniperduels.shop/gems): Bulk gem purchase with tiered pricing ($2.90/k → $2.65/k at 100k+), live calculator, automated bot delivery in <2 minutes.
- [Item shop](https://sniperduels.shop/shop): Snipers, knives, and crates — automated trade-bot delivery, 24/7 availability.
- [100k gems](https://sniperduels.shop/gems/100k): Pre-set 100,000-gem purchase at the bulk tier.
- [500k gems](https://sniperduels.shop/gems/500k): Pre-set 500,000-gem purchase at the bulk tier.
- [1M gems](https://sniperduels.shop/gems/1m): Pre-set 1,000,000-gem purchase at the bulk tier.
- [Cheap gems](https://sniperduels.shop/gems/cheap): Cheapest available gem listing across all active vendors.
- [Buy gems landing](https://sniperduels.shop/gems/buy): Direct gem-purchase entry point with vendor selector.
- [FAQ](https://sniperduels.shop/faq): Payment methods, delivery process, refund policy, OAuth/safety, bulk pricing, account requirements.
- [About](https://sniperduels.shop/about): How the auto-shop works, team, operating model.
- [Refunds policy](https://sniperduels.shop/refunds): Wallet-credit auto-refunds for failed deliveries, repeat-victim rebate program.
- [Terms of service](https://sniperduels.shop/terms): Purchase terms and account rules.
- [Privacy policy](https://sniperduels.shop/privacy): Data handling, OAuth scope, payment processor disclosure.

## Optional

- [Value list (companion)](https://sniperduels.net/values): Free live value list for all 218 Sniper Duels weapons — companion content site, no checkout.
- [Trading guide](https://sniperduels.net/trading-guide): Free trade-up logic and fair-value math from the companion content site.
- [Discord](https://sniperduels.net/discord): Official Sniper Duels Discord — support, trading, free middleman service.
